response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified "愛♡スクリーム!" and "イケナイ太陽" from on-screen text in the top-left corner. 2. Identified Orange Range as the original artist for "イケナイ太陽" via search. 3. Confirmed "愛♡スクリーム!" as a song associated with the Love Live franchise/AiScReam unit via search. 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs using "[Song Title] [Artist] lyrics" format. 5. Lyrics for "イケナイ太陽" were successfully found and translated. Lyrics for "愛♡スクリーム!" were not consistently found as a full text, so set to null. 6. Generated JSON structure based on the findings.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performance by Aki Rosenthal and other VTubers, featuring "愛♡スクリーム!" and "イケナイ太陽" with a short dialogue transition.

scenes.description: The characters perform "愛♡スクリーム!". The title appears in the top-left corner.
A brief interlude with dialogue and a transition to the next song.
The characters perform "イケナイ太陽". The title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
オレの青春そんなもんじゃない
熱く奥で果てたいよ
きっとキミじゃなきゃやだよ
オレはイケナイ太陽
Na Na Na...
「赤い糸」なんて絵空事
でも下心でさえ信じたいの
俺は正しいキミも正しい
とにかくもう左右されないゼ
オレはイケナイ太陽
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My youth isn't just something like that
I want to burn it out, deep inside
Surely, it has to be you, I don't want anyone else
I am the forbidden sun
Na Na Na...
Even if 'red thread' is just an empty dream
I want to believe in even ulterior motives
I'm right, you're right
Anyway, I won't be swayed anymore
I'm the forbidden sun
